full_text:
Ananya Krishnan
 Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India | +91 98765 43210 | ananya.krishnan.ds@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/ananyakrishnan-ds
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Data Scientist with 4+ years of experience building machine learning models for demand forecasting, customer
segmentation, and NLP-based text classification. Skilled in translating business problems into statistical models and
deploying them into production pipelines using Python and cloud platforms.
SKILLS
Python
SQL
R
Scikit-learn
TensorFlow
PyTorch
Pandas / NumPy
Feature Engineering
A/B Testing
Tableau
Power BI
AWS SageMaker
Natural Language Processing
Time Series Forecasting
Git
WORK EXPERIENCE
Data Scientist — Veridian Analytics Pvt Ltd
Bengaluru, India | Jul 2022 – Present
 Built a demand-forecasting model using XGBoost that reduced inventory holding costs by 18% across 12
warehouses.
 Developed an NLP pipeline to classify customer support tickets into 9 categories, cutting manual triage time by
40%.
 Partnered with product teams to design and analyze A/B tests, informing 6 major feature launches.
 Mentored 2 junior analysts on statistical modeling and reproducible research practices.
Data Analyst — Northbridge Consulting
Chennai, India | Jun 2020 – Jun 2022
 Automated weekly reporting workflows in Python, saving roughly 10 analyst-hours per week.
 Built customer segmentation models that improved targeted marketing conversion by 12%.
 Created interactive Tableau dashboards used by leadership for quarterly business reviews.
PROJECTS
Churn Prediction Engine (Personal Project)
 Designed an end-to-end churn prediction pipeline using scikit-learn and deployed it via Flask on AWS EC2.
 Achieved 0.87 ROC-AUC on a telecom churn dataset using gradient boosting and SMOTE for class balancing.
EDUCATION
M.Sc. in Data Science
PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore | 2018 – 2020
B.Sc. in Statistics
Bharathiar University, Coimbatore | 2015 – 2018
CERTIFICATIONS
 AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty (2023)
 Deep Learning Specialization, Coursera (2021)
